  - Pass maintainership to submitter

 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org

 COMMENT=	Generate secure random pronounceable passwords

+
 USES=		perl5
